raw_text: francisco reyes guerrero paseo de la esperanza, 1, madrid, 28005 email: franreyesgue@gmail.com tel: +34 699 877 474. date of birth: 07/10/1992 education university of manchester 2014-2015 msc aerospace engineering grade: 6.7 e modules included advanced modelling and simulation, advanced cfd, advanced propulsion and advanced aerodynamics. e dissertation project: computation of wall heat transfer in rotating passages, in collaboration with computational fluid dynamic department. achieved a grade of 6.7. e performance leader in team project, designing, testing and building a fully autonomous unmanned aerial vehicle (uav) for a potential customer. universidad politécnica de madrid 2010-2014 bsc aerospace engineering grade: 6.81 e major in aerospace propulsion. modules included heat transfer, cfd, advanced fluid mechanics and mathematical methods. e dissertation project: fire retardancy in polylactic acid composites, in collaboration with imdea materials. achieved a grade of 9.5. e chief engineer leader in team project, taking the initiative in every decision. the aim was to design a hang glider with cad software (catia v5). as a team, we succeed and got a grade of 7.8. engineering work experience akka technologies, getafe june 2016 - now thermal and cfd engineer e airbus defence and space on behalf of akka technologies. e carried out a 2d and 3d thermal analysis of a320neo fan cowl of cfm engine with ansys fluent, by cleaning up the geometry in catia v5, making a structured mesh in ansys meshing and finally running the thermal analysis in fluent and steady-state thermal module. e performed thermal analysis of a320neo fan cowl of pratt & whitney engine, as well as the cowl of thrust reversal. e thermal analysis of the bleed air leak detection system (balds) in fluent. airbus operations s.l., getafe oct 2015 june 2016 aeronautical engineer intern e in egwms (flight physics mass properties department), i carried out a trade-off campaign on a330 metallic wing covers to find an optimum structure solution with minimum weight, by using presto, a rapid sizing tool linked with nastran, femix and isami, launched through unix environment. e writing of presto documentation and user manuals. e in eglcg (flight physics - component loads department), i performed a fleet survey on a380 flight data of three airlines, to ensure the current htp loads are in agreement with design loads, by performing a statistical analysis using matlab and excel. page 1 of 2 e carried out an analysis of loads generated in windmilling imbalance scenario on a350 program, to ensure this load imbalance is within ultimate loads envelope. e on demand matlab and visual basic scripts development for tasks automation. university of manchester, manchester april oct 2015 research associate e carried out a research about the computation of wall heat transfer in rotating passages, especially focused in the cooling of gas turbine blades, using ansys fluent for modelling and simulating. e performed grid-independence study in meshes of up to 2 million of nodes. e applied ke and rsm turbulence models, alongside different wall treatments, both in 2d and 3d. e computational analyses were performed in 4 cores in parallel in a high performance computing (hpc) pc cluster, through unix environment. imdea materials, madrid feb july 2014 research associate e led a research on epoxy resins and biodegradable polymers. e improved the properties of polymer pla (polylactic acid) in the laboratory, adding flame-retardants additives i synthesised, obtaining excellent results focused in making pla a more environmentally friendly material. e analysed different manufacturing processes to ensure the optimum material properties. due to this initiative, a new manufacturing procedure was adopted, which solved further problems of fragility. e communicated regularly with group leader about material performance. e awarded as the most profitable research team in the company. e two scientific papers published as co-author (dot: 10.1021/acssuschemeng.5b00980 and 10.1016/j.polymdegradstab.2016.01.014 ). furthermore, a patent is being applied for. additional skills it e proficient in the use of ansys fluent, originpro, matlab and fortran . sound knowledge of catia v5, latex, python and visual basic. driving e full clean driving license languages e english: fluent (c1 level) french: basic-intermediate (a2 level) e spanish: native sport e professional table tennis player for 2 years in 2009. as a team, we managed to ascend to the national league, and won 3 tournaments. e regularly participated in football matches at airbus and at university of manchester. referees mr radoslaw zawadzki mr oscar castro alvarez head of mass estimation and control head of
